commands.purpose: Table view of staff. Filterable by tenant, branch, employment_status, position, department. --is-manager filters is_branch_manager=true. --include-offboarded shows offboarded rows; default hides them. Compensation fields NEVER shown at CLI — support-tooling redaction still applies.

Verbose read of one Staff row: base fields + linked User + Profile (redacted if invoker lacks permissions) + Coach profile if any + team memberships summary + direct reports (when org_chart entitlement on) + compensation summary (only when invoked with --show-compensation AND caller carries staff.view.compensation).

Scriptable staff hire (test harness + tenant onboarding). --dry-run validates the input against every observer rule without persisting. Compensation cannot be set from this CLI — use staff:audit-compensation or the /compensation endpoint.

CLI equivalent of POST /{staff}/promote-to-manager. --demote-current (default: true) auto-demotes the existing branch manager in the same transaction; passing --no-demote-current refuses when another manager exists.
Demote a branch manager. Warns if this leaves the branch leaderless.
Transition to on_leave. Cascades: pauses linked Coach.
Transition on_leave → active. Resumes linked Coach if paused as a side-effect of the leave.
Disciplinary suspend. Audit-critical. Refuses without a reason. Cascades: pauses linked Coach.
Transition suspended → active. Audit-critical.
Offboard flow. --cascade archives linked Coach + removes team memberships in one transaction. Prompts for confirmation unless --no-interaction. Refuses without --reason.
Rehire an offboarded staff. Rare — audit-critical.

Compliance-only export. Emits a signed audit CSV of every entry in staff_compensation_history for the tenant + window. Requires the caller to have run `sudo` or provide their platform_admin token via env. Every invocation writes a P1 audit row + notifies the tenant admin's compliance address.
Table view of coaches. --sport filters sport_key + additional_sports. Rating shown only when coach_rating_display entitlement is on for the tenant.
Verbose read of one Coach: base fields + parent Staff summary + certifications (verified state highlighted when coach_certifications_verified is on) + team memberships + trailing rating history.
Create a Coach row for a Staff that has assumed a coaching role. --dry-run validates without persisting.
Change Coach.sport_key. Fires CoachSportChanged.
Append a certification. When coach_certifications_verified is on, enters pending_verification state — must be verified separately.
Remove a certification entry. Fires CoachCertificationRemoved.
Replace availability_pattern from a JSON file. Fires CoachAvailabilityChanged.
Transition Coach.status active → paused. Non-disciplinary.
Transition paused → active.
Terminal transition. Removes team assignments. Precondition to soft-delete.

One-shot invocation of AggregateCoachRatingsJob for the given window + tenant scope. Recomputes Coach.rating + rating_count from Wave 3+ session-rating rows. --dry-run reports the deltas without applying them.
